name: survey-service
description: Internal survey/form ingestion, analysis, and Angular UI (monorepo scaffold).

scripts.build: npm --workspace @survey-service/web run build && npm --workspace @survey-service/api run build && npm --workspace @survey-service/worker run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:worker
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api && npm run lint:worker
scripts.format: npm run format:web && npm run format:api && npm run format:worker
scripts.format:check:all: npm run format:check:web && npm run format:check:api && npm run format:check:worker
